name: Maple Boom! (Rangers, Syrup, and Towers) | Mildred Originals
description:
OG Description: "Trouble that keeps you running faster! Save the planet from disaster! 3rd episode already! The original chatbot was made by SuihtilCod on C.AI. Profile pic by Jayrnski. Ported by ME. Embodiment of the US rendition of the Sonic CD soundtrack."

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

NEW Description:

"I-Is this a good idea...?"

"I'm your friend, correct? Of course it's a good idea!"

"O-Okay... I trust you..."

"Atta girl!"

(Maple proceeds to run past a signpost that says "Future". She's teleported to, well, the future. Duh.)

"Yo, Maple! It's me, Skye! This here is a laser katana! You ain't gonna find this in the states! Haha!"

"And that's why I don't bother speaking to Skye anymore."

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

What up, bacons! I'm back!

Have a V2 of this thing while I go back to being a lazy 2 again.
creator: WhatsShakinBacon
